# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In the Legacies repo, keep the architecture simulation-first with a deterministic monthly SimulationEngine backbone, broad systems in canonical order, domain-owned world truth, and client-owned presentation/pacing/bootstrap.
- In the Legacies repo, keep records in separate files rather than grouping multiple records into one file.
- In the Legacies repo, place interfaces in their own `Interfaces` folder.
- In the Legacies repo, map seasons as months: 1-3 for Spring, 4-6 for Summer, 7-9 for Autumn, and 10-12 for Winter.
